name: Site Blocker
description: Block distracting websites with a single click. Set schedules, add custom rules, and stay focused — all without any data leaving your browser.
longDescription: Site Blocker is a lightweight browser extension that helps you stay productive by blocking distracting websites on demand or on a schedule. Everything runs locally — no accounts, no cloud sync, no tracking. Just a simple, powerful focus tool.

featureGrid.title: Block Any Site
featureGrid.description: Add any domain to your blocklist in seconds. Wildcards and subdomains supported.

featureGrid.title: Time Schedules
featureGrid.description: Set daily schedules so blocking activates automatically during your focus hours.

featureGrid.title: Password Lock
featureGrid.description: Lock your settings with a password to avoid impulsive overrides.

featureGrid.title: Privacy First
featureGrid.description: Zero data collection. Blocklists stay on your device and never touch a server.

name: QR Code Generator
description: Instantly generate QR codes for any URL, text, or data right from your browser toolbar. No sign-up, no limits, no tracking.
longDescription: QR Code Generator lets you create QR codes for any URL, text, email, or phone number directly in your browser. Generated codes can be downloaded as PNG — no data is sent anywhere, everything is rendered locally using the Canvas API.

featureGrid.title: Instant Results
featureGrid.description: QR codes render in real-time as you type — no button press needed.

featureGrid.title: Download as PNG
featureGrid.description: Save any QR code as a high-quality PNG with a single click.

featureGrid.title: Any Content
featureGrid.description: Encode URLs, plain text, emails, phone numbers, or any arbitrary string.

featureGrid.title: No Server Calls
featureGrid.description: All generation happens in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server.

name: Image Editor
description: Crop, resize, convert, and annotate images directly in your browser — no uploads, no accounts, no waiting.
longDescription: Image Editor is an upcoming browser extension that brings a full-featured image editing suite to your browser toolbar. Built entirely with the Canvas API, every operation happens locally — your images never leave your device.

featureGrid.title: Crop & Resize
featureGrid.description: Precisely crop or resize any image to an exact pixel dimension or free-form selection.

featureGrid.title: Annotate
featureGrid.description: Add text, arrows, shapes, and highlights to images for sharing or documentation.

featureGrid.title: Format Convert
featureGrid.description: Convert between PNG, JPEG, WebP, and more with quality controls.

featureGrid.title: Fully Offline
featureGrid.description: No uploads. No API calls. Every pixel stays on your machine.

name: QR Code Reader
description: Scan and decode QR codes from any image on the page or uploaded file — entirely in-browser, with zero data sent externally.
longDescription: QR Code Reader is an upcoming extension that lets you decode QR codes from images anywhere on the web or from files on your computer. Powered by a local JS decoding library — no camera required, no server uploads.

featureGrid.title: Scan from Page
featureGrid.description: Right-click any image on any webpage to instantly decode its QR code.

featureGrid.title: From File
featureGrid.description: Upload an image from your device and decode it locally.

featureGrid.title: Copy Result
featureGrid.description: Decoded text is shown and copied to clipboard in one click.

featureGrid.title: No Uploads
featureGrid.description: All decoding is done in-browser. No image ever leaves your device.

name: VocabBuilder
description: Build your vocabulary passively as you browse. Highlight any word to get definitions, examples, and save it to your personal word list.
longDescription: VocabBuilder is an upcoming extension that turns any webpage into a language learning opportunity. Highlight a word to see its definition, pronunciation, and example sentences. Save words to a local list and review them later — all without leaving your browser or sending any data externally.

featureGrid.title: Inline Definitions
featureGrid.description: Highlight any word on any page to instantly see its definition and pronunciation.

featureGrid.title: Personal Word List
featureGrid.description: Save words you want to remember. Your list is stored locally in browser storage.

featureGrid.title: Flashcard Review
featureGrid.description: Review saved words with a built-in flashcard mode directly in the popup.

featureGrid.title: No Account
featureGrid.description: Your word list never touches a server. 100% local, 100% private.
